---
title: "Hazar ratio - semana 11"
author: "ESCALANTE MORENO HAROLD"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

```{r}
#COEFICIENTE BETA 
beta<--0.405

#Cálculo del Hazar ratio 
HR<-exp(beta)

#mostrar resultado 
HR
```

```{r}
#Interpretacion
cat("Hazard ratio=",round(HR,3),"\n")
cat("El programa reduce el riesgo en", round((1-HR)*100,1),"% respecto al grupo de control.")
```
